response:
The cheapest commonly recommended alternatives to ProfitWell for subscription/SaaS analytics are **Pabbly Subscriptions**, **PaySketch**, **GrowPanel**, and the open‑source **Pulse** project, with several others (Baremetrics, ChartMogul, Databox, etc.) in the low–mid price range depending on your MRR and feature needs.[1][2][5][6]

Below is a concise comparison focused on **cost** while still covering what each tool does.

| Tool | Typical role vs ProfitWell | Indicative pricing (cheaper end) | Notable pros/cons vs ProfitWell |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Pabbly Subscriptions** | Subscription management + analytics | From **$5/month** for up to 50 customers, higher tiers $29, $59, $99/month for more customers[1] | Very cheap at small scale, includes dunning emails, recurring payments, multiple gateways, supports PayPal & Stripe (ProfitWell’s core analytics historically didn’t cover PayPal)[1] |
| **PaySketch** | Payment analytics focused on PayPal | From **$7.99/month** for 5,000 transactions, up to $11.99/month for 50,000 transactions[1] | Low flat pricing, strong PayPal reporting; less of a full subscription/MRR tool than ProfitWell[1] |
| **GrowPanel** | SaaS metrics & forecasting (direct ProfitWell Metrics alternative) | **Free up to $200k ARR**, then “scale affordably”[2] | Real‑time data, AI chat analysis, predictive forecasting; positioned explicitly as a ProfitWell alternative with more advanced insights[2] |
| **Pulse (open‑source)** | Self‑hosted SaaS analytics (Baremetrics/ProfitWell‑like) | **Free & open source**; optional free hosted version[5] | No license cost; transparent, extensible via SQL/dbt; requires more technical setup/maintenance[5] |
| **Baremetrics** | Deep SaaS analytics (churn, cohorts, etc.) | Starts around **$50/month** for low MRR accounts[1][3] | Rich metrics, cohorts, real‑time dashboards; often cheaper than custom ProfitWell Retain fees, but not cheaper than ProfitWell’s free core plan at very low scale[1][3] |
| **ChartMogul** | Subscription analytics / revenue metrics | Paid plans from about **$125/month** after free tier[1][6] | Well‑known analytics suite; generally **more expensive**, not “cheaper,” but a key alternative if you outgrow free tools[1][6] |
| **Databox** | General BI/analytics (can include Stripe, revenue KPIs) | **Free** tier (3 data connections, 3 users), business plan ~$249/month[1] | Good if you want broader dashboards across tools; cheaper only if you can stay on the free or lower plan[1] |
| **Statsbot** | Analytics + notifications | Pricing not front‑and‑center but generally SaaS style[1] | Focus on alerts/insights from payment data rather than full subscription stack[1] |
| **SubscriptionFlow** | Subscription management platform | Commercial SaaS; marketed as “best ProfitWell alternative”[4] | More of an all‑in‑one subscription system (billing + analytics) than a pure metrics layer[4] |
| **Chartsy** | Modern subscription analytics | Listed in “Best ProfitWell Alternatives in 2026” overview[6] | Newer, lighter tool aimed at SaaS metrics; pricing tends to be lower than legacy players, but exact numbers depend on current plan[6] |

### How to pick the *cheapest* viable alternative for your case

1. **Pre‑revenue or early (<$200k ARR)**  
   - **GrowPanel**: free to $200k ARR, includes real‑time metrics and AI analysis.[2]  
   - **Pulse (open‑source)**: free if you can host it yourself or use the free hosted beta.[5]  
   - **Databox Free**: if you just need a few KPIs and data sources.[1]

2. **Very cost‑sensitive but need billing + analytics in one**  
   - **Pabbly Subscriptions**: $5/month starter, includes billing, dunning, and analytics, supports multiple gateways including PayPal and Stripe.[1]

3. **PayPal‑heavy business**  
   - **PaySketch**: from $7.99/month for extensive PayPal analytics.[1]

4. **Need deeper SaaS metrics but still price‑aware**  
   - **Baremetrics**: more advanced than ProfitWell’s free metrics in some areas (cohorts, real‑time, customer‑level views), starting around $
